title: Intro to APIs
body: APIs return structured data such as JSON.

title: Rate limits
body: Respect API rate limits to avoid being blocked.

title: Parsing JSON
body: Convert JSON responses into DataFrames for analysis.

title: Web scraping
body: Use BeautifulSoup to parse HTML when no API exists.

title: Ethics
body: Always consider TOS, robots.txt, and privacy when collecting data.
